name: The Margin Between Outcome and Catastrophe
premise: Five days after the Industrial Canal floodwall failures, three survivors in three separate locations must coordinate across a communications blackout to secure extraction for eighty bridge camp refugees, recover irreplaceable legal documents from a flooded house, and transmit accurate coordinates before a dying battery goes QRT — while a diverted supply chain and a falsified grid reference threaten to collapse all three efforts simultaneously.
goal: Secure confirmed extraction for the bridge camp's most vulnerable survivors, recover the Fontenot land deeds before mold liquefaction, and transmit accurate coordinates to the emergency operations post before the Algiers radio station loses power — exposing and neutralizing the two systemic failures that are actively working against all three objectives.
openingSituation: 4:45 PM, September 2, 2005. A flat-bottom skiff carrying a pharmaceutical crate is knocking against the St. Claude Bridge piling. A waterlogged iron document box is pinned under collapsed plaster on Deslonde Street. A marine battery in an Algiers attic is dropping toward terminal voltage. All three crises are connected by a single diverted supply manifest and a single falsified coordinate — neither of which any one character can see in full.

beats.description: Loretta Sainte-Claire confronts the skiff operator, Darnell Arceneaux, at the bridge piling and must decide whether to accept the medical crate and displace the three children onto the deck
Marcus Fontenot locates the iron document box under the collapsed plaster ceiling in the Deslonde Street shotgun house and assesses the degradation state of the wet-swollen seams
Ida Broussard receives the first runner with handwritten triage sheets and checks her battery voltage — the frequency is already drifting 200 Hz off the designated emergency net

Loretta discovers that the pharmaceutical lot number on the crate does not match the regional emergency supply manifest — the crate was diverted from a confirmed FEMA staging shipment by an intermediary

Marcus, clearing plaster debris, finds a second document inside the iron box: a carbon-copy receipt showing that a city assessor's agent named Cynthia Tureaud visited the Deslonde Street property on August 31 and logged it as abandoned

Ida attempts to compress the triage data into coordinate bursts and realizes that the grid reference provided by the second runner, Terrence Guidry, contains a transposition error that would place the extraction zone in the middle of the Industrial Canal
The Ambient_Toxicity_Index advances to Hazardous after a fuel drum ruptures two blocks from the bridge — a survivor with open wounds must be treated immediately

Cross-referencing testimony from Darnell Arceneaux and the bridge camp's supply ledger reveals that Father Clement Tureaud — Cynthia Tureaud's brother and the camp's informal chaplain — signed the diversion authorization for the pharmaceutical crate, redirecting it from the official FEMA channel to his own distribution network

Marcus confronts Cynthia Tureaud's abandoned-property filing directly: the date stamp proves she filed it while residents were still legally sheltering in place, constituting fraudulent classification under Louisiana emergency property law
Ida, now working with corrected coordinates verified by Loretta's bridge-deck mirror array alignment, prepares a final compressed transmission — but the battery is at 18% and dropping

Father Clement, confronted with the diversion manifest, attempts to reframe the supply redirection as pastoral necessity — his breaking point is the revelation that the three children on the skiff were from the same family whose property Cynthia filed as abandoned

Ida transmits the corrected SITREP and grid coordinates in compressed burst mode at 14% battery — Signal_Beacon_Visibility must be above 60 for the transmission to be actionable by the receiving airframe

Loretta must make a final resource allocation decision: use the last electrolyte packages on the three children now on the deck, or hold them for the medically critical adults whose extraction window is shorter

Marcus secures the recovered land deed and the carbon-copy assessor's receipt in a waterproof bag and reaches the bridge on foot via the elevated I-10 service road — his testimony about the fraudulent abandonment filing becomes the legal record

The extraction window closes: the game resolves based on the cumulative state of all three metric systems, the accuracy of the transmitted coordinates, the integrity of the recovered documents, and whether Father Clement's supply diversion has been formally documented for post-storm accountability
